positive: A stylized celestial forest scene featuring interconnected bioluminescent flora and fauna. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, depicting glowing abstract tree roots forming geometric mandalas, intertwined with delicate glowing fireflies and crescent moon motifs. The color palette is deep midnight blue, indigo, cyan, and vibrant emerald green, emphasized by neon glowing accents. Style must be highly intricate, combining Art Nouveau elegance with abstract geometric low poly elements. High contrast and clean silhouettes are essential for optimal apparel printing. The overall mood is mysterious, magical, and serene. Digital illustration, vector style, symmetrical composition, clean lines, perfect symmetry.
